statement: In every magma, Equation 1906 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (x * z)`) implies Equation 4016 (`x * y = (z * (y * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0698
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op x z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op y z)) w)
